title: hieracium cymosum subsp. praealtum
intro: Hieracium cymosum subsp. praealtum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium cymosum subsp. praealtum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by drying and powdering them for use in teas, salves, and other topical applications.
